data.name: Shining Girls
data.detailed_description:
Shining Girls is a relaxing puzzle game and multiple unique sexy girls.
Enjoy cute girls in the background of gentle music and complete puzzles.
Swap puzzle pieces to complete levels and unlock more viewing modes.
Watch the full picture after completing the puzzle.
No time limit, you can enjoy the game.



Feature :
Sexy girls pictures & Relaxing music.
Fullview mode after completing a level.
Game with many levels playing with different levels .

data.short_description: Shining Girls is a relaxing puzzle game and multiple unique sexy girls.The game is a jigsaw puzzle, where players move puzzle pieces to restore the original image.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 日文*, 簡體中文*, 瑞典文*, 繁體中文*, 韓文*, 阿拉伯文*, 保加利亞文*, 捷克文*, 丹麥文*, 荷蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 希臘文*, 匈牙利文*, 印尼語*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 俄文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 泰文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: 3.4 GHz Dual Core Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
